content:
INTELLIGENCE BRIEFING — Sun, 15 Feb 2026 20:49:41 GMT
Overall Threat Level: CRITICAL
Total Events: 240 | Critical: 73 | High: 34 | Medium: 19 | Low: 114

CRITICAL ALERTS:
  [MIDDLE EAST] Israeli strike in eastern Lebanon kills four near Syrian border (Middle East Eye)
  [MIDDLE EAST] Iran FM heads to Geneva for second round of nuclear talks with US : ministry (GDELT)
  [MIDDLE EAST] Report : US Preparing for Sustained , Weeks - Long War Against Iran If Trump Orders Attack (GDELT)
  [UKRAINE] Ukrainian drone strike sparks fires at Russian Black Sea port (GDELT)
  [UKRAINE] Poland should develop its own nuclear defences amid growing threat from Russia , says president (GDELT)

REGIONAL ASSESSMENT:
  Middle East (51 events, 25 critical, 10 high):
    - Israeli strike in eastern Lebanon kills four near Syrian border
    - Iran FM heads to Geneva for second round of nuclear talks with US : ministry
    - Report : US Preparing for Sustained , Weeks - Long War Against Iran If Trump Orders Attack
  Ukraine/Russia (15 events, 4 critical, 3 high):
    - Ukrainian drone strike sparks fires at Russian Black Sea port
    - Poland should develop its own nuclear defences amid growing threat from Russia , says president
    - Ukrainian slider's Olympics over as helmet appeal dismissed
  Europe (38 events, 13 critical, 3 high):
    - Russia killed opposition leader Alexei Navalny using dart frog toxin, UK says
    - Two Britons among three dead in French Alps avalanche
    - Motorway collapses as deadly storms hit France, Portugal and Spain
  Indo-Pacific (42 events, 3 critical, 4 high):
    - North Korea draws new red line, vows attack over future airspace ‘violations’
    - Gilded Capability: Overinvestment and the Survivability Paradox
    - Russia’s Lavrov calls North Koreas nukes the key to its prosperity
  United States (10 events, 2 critical, 4 high):
    - US military used Anthropic’s AI model Claude in Venezuela raid, report says
    - Inside the Strike: The US Munition That Hit a Residential Building in Venezuela
    - US forces board ship in Indian Ocean that fled Caribbean blockade : Pentagon
  Global (63 events, 14 critical, 8 high):
    - ‘People want to help’: Canadians rally round Tumbler Ridge after school shooting
    - New Zealand officials warn more flooding could hit north island as man killed after heavy rain
    - FCAS may survive, but next-gen fighter negotiations all but dead: Industry source

Sources: Middle East Eye, GDELT, BBC World, The Guardian, NYT World, Al Jazeera, BBC Europe, Breaking Defense, BBC Africa, Defense News, CISA Advisories, War on the Rocks, NK News, BBC Middle East, Bellingcat, BBC Latin America, BBC Asia, The Diplomat
